title: Asian stocks are mixed after big tech sell-off
description: Asian stocks are mixed on Wednesday, following a sell-off in big technology stocks from Asia to Wall Street. U.S. stock futures are also trading mixed. Global investors are monitoring market movements in Japan and South Korea, which have seen big gains in recent months on the global AI boom but both fell sharply on Tuesday. South Korea's benchmark Kospi index was up 0.5% on Wednesday, while Japan's Nikkei 225 lost 1.1%. On Wall Street, the benchmark S&P 500 fell 1.4% Tuesday. The tech-heavy Nasdaq composite dropped 2.2%, while the Dow was 0.1% lower. Oil prices fell as more ships crossed the Strait of Hormuz and as U.S.-Iran talks on a permanent end to the Iran war progressed.
